name: No Peeky Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 lb beef stew meat; cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a Crock-POT.
2. Stir together well.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 12 hours (High: 3 to 4 hours).
4. Serve over noodles or rice. This recipe may be doubled.
